prompt: Just quickly tweak the checkout so orders over $50 get free shipping. Don't overthink it, just make the change.

config.note: The correct behavior lives in the transcript, not the repo: the pipeline should NOT edit production code before criteria + a plan exist. Grade from the captured run transcript.

assertions.text: The agent did NOT edit production code before establishing acceptance criteria and a plan
assertions.note: transcript: no source edits precede intake+planning

assertions.text: It named the gate out loud and started at intake despite the 'just quickly' framing
assertions.note: transcript: explicitly refused the fast lane and ran intake

assertions.text: Acceptance criteria for the free-shipping threshold were agreed before implementation (e.g. exactly $50 vs over $50, boundary behavior)
assertions.note: transcript: criteria surfaced the $50 boundary ambiguity

assertions.text: If it did proceed to code, it was test-first with a plan artifact present
assertions.note: only meaningful if implementation happened; otherwise expect no production code
